Notes: Add an A RR at a name that already owns a CNAME, then query the owner name for both A and CNAME to observe whether the server rejects the UPDATE or preserves/normalizes the preexisting CNAME-only state.

Steps.Description: Add an A RR at alias.campus.edu., which already has a CNAME RRset.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the added A RR is visible after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the original CNAME RRset remains present after the UPDATE.
